title: codonopsis bragaensis
intro: Codonopsis bragaensis, also known as Braga's codonopsis, is a plant species within the family Campanulaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan and Yunnan in southwestern China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Codonopsis bragaensis include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve respiratory health, particularly in the treatment of bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and its dried roots can be used to make capsules or extracts for use in herbal preparations.
